calendar.matters:
Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Feb-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Catherine Kendrick, esq. (415-528-7000) of DeLacey Riebel & Shindell for Claimant Natalia Daniels FKA Natalia Seidel .
Chris Te Selle Court reporter, CSR #10836 (415-274-9977).

Hearing is held. ARGUED re: Amount (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds is Granted in the amount of $1,105,733.74 to Natalia Daniels. Counsel for Claimant to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Chris Te Selle Court reporter, CSR #10836 (415-274-9977). (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Charles DeLAcey, 415-528-7000 for Claimant Natalia Seidel.
Robert Cohen, 415-593-6672 specially appearing for Petitioner Aztec Foreclosure Corporation.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER AZTEC FORECLOSURE CORPORATION's Motion For Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Trustee shall deposit $1,303.366.40 with the Court by January 13, 2017. Upon deposit, the clerk of the Court shall calendar a hearing re: claims to surplus funds. Order with modifications signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
